objective: Review the mostConnectedNode pure helper and stats CLI extension implementation for spec compliance, security, architecture, conventions, and testing
key_changes: mostConnectedNode() pure helper added to graph.ts — counts from/to incidences, returns { node: Node | null, degree: number }, tie-break by graph.nodes order
carto stats CLI extended to print most-connected node title and degree in chalk.cyan, or chalk.gray (no edges) sentinel
4 vitest tests added for mostConnectedNode: no-edges sentinel, bidirectional degree counting, first-encountered tie-break, empty graph
graphStats() tests removed (2 tests) — function now has zero test coverage (low-severity advisory)
No security, architecture, or convention issues found — all checks pass
